items.title: Accenture and Snowflake Drive Enterprise Reinvention with AI and Data
items.description: NEW YORK & No-Headquarters/BOZEMAN, Mont., December 03, 2025--Accenture and Snowflake are expanding their collaboration to scale generative AI innovation and business outcomes for clients, such as Caterpillar.

items.title: Caterpillar: AI Tailwinds Are Real, Yet The Core Business Keeps Me Neutral
